chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3022 of 2025 (Kiran versus Province of Sindh & others) Date Order with signature of Judge Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi For hearing of main case 15.4.2026 Mr. Shahid Hussain advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant AG Malik Altaf Hussain advocate for the respondent / KMC --------------------- Both the parties submit that the petitioner has received pensionary amount, therefore, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition as the purpose of filing the same has been served. According, the petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
